name: Kapusniak Ze Swiezej Kapusty (Cabbage Soup)
recipeIngredient: 3/4 lb Pork, lean, cut into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the pork in butter.
2. Add remaining ingredients except sour cream to the pot.
3. Cover and cook over low heat for 30 minutes, stirring often.
4. Serve with spoonfuls of sour cream.
5. This is a Balkan stew-soup to make a supper. Origin: A Campbell cookbook - Cooking with Soup. GEnie F&WRT
